files.run_variant.py:
import pathlib, sys
variant = sys.argv[1]
path = pathlib.Path('app.py')
if variant == 'baseline':
    path.write_text("def compute(x):\n    return x\n")
else:
    path.write_text("def compute(x):\n    return x * 2\n")
files.verify.py:
import json
from app import compute
value = compute(2)
if value == 4:
    print(json.dumps({'tests_passed': 3, 'tests_total': 3, 'findings': 0, 'tokens_used': 18000}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'tests_passed': 1, 'tests_total': 3, 'findings': 2, 'tokens_used': 18000}))
